dj_text: Alright, Bad Romance (Bardcore | Medieval Style Cover). Let's tone it down a notch. Or seven. Here's Somebody That I Used To Know (Bardcore | Medieval Style Cover with Vocals).
commercial_text: Are you still listening? Good. Don't touch that dial. Or do. We literally can't stop you. You're in control.

title: Somebody That I Used To Know (Bardcore | Medieval Style Cover with Vocals)
